title: Segmentation fault occurs in case when use sim command without top module specification.

features.name: ifdef without top module in sim command
features.description: Code should include an ifdef/else/endif preprocessor block with different logic in each branch, used with Yosys sim command without top module specification

features.name: sequential logic in conditional block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge) block with non-blocking assignment inside an ifndef conditional branch

features.name: multiple module instantiation without top
features.description: Code should include multiple module instantiations (middle, u_rtl) with a shared wire connection, processed by sim command without top module
